title: stachys virgata
intro: Stachys virgata, also known as upright betony or carder's bell, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Stachys virgata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
